title: The mobile navigator's first tab follows the view you're in
summary: On phones, the center navigator sheet's first tab is now contextual — like the desktop bottom-left island. It shows Explorer on the workspace, Settings on the settings screen, Tasks on tasks, and so on, instead of always saying Explorer.
highlights: The navigator's contextual tab tracks the current view (Explorer / Settings / Tasks / Chats / …)
Picking a panel surface from Surfaces opens it right there in the navigator
